productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Navy Blue Shirt
description: Style Note This navy blue shirt with dobby weave, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this stylish shirt. Style this with your favourite jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe.
